installation_requirements.purpose: Permits installation of these lifts on lower specification concrete floors

LC-12_and_LC-12-3SA.requirement_with_overhead_beam: 6-1/2 inch thick, 3250 PSI or 4-1/2 inch thick, 4000 PSI

installation_requirements.concrete_slab_notes: Continuous concrete slabs to be free of defects and cracks, provide proper anchor edge distance to seams, and have a minimum of 6x6 wire mesh reinforcement
installation_requirements.special_instructions: Connect spring to grenade switch on top of motor; Position screw such that the eye hole is inside the channel

specifications.title: SHORT (IA/LC12) O/H Beam Assy (for 2-Post)
specifications.welding_specs: AWS specifications to E-70xx electrodes or E-70T1 Code 5.3 flux core wire only

features: Short overhead beam support connects the two posts at the top
Allows installation on lower specification concrete floors
Reduces minimum concrete PSI requirements for System IA-10
Reduces minimum concrete thickness requirements for LC-12 (from 6-1/2 to 4-1/2 inch at 4000 PSI)
Includes overhead line shutoff cable assembly
Spring-loaded grenade switch safety system at top of motor

parts_list.description: O/H Beam Vert Assy (1 Post), SHORT (IA/LC12)
Bolt, Hex Head, 1/2-13 NC x 5 inch (GR5)

safety_features: O/H line shutoff cable assembly included
Spring-loaded grenade switch connection at top of motor
Extension spring (9/16 dia x 4-1/8 long) for safety switch activation
Concrete slabs must be continuous, free of defects and cracks
notes: Position screw such that the eye hole is inside the channel
Connect spring to grenade switch on top of motor
This is the SHORT version for System IA-10 and LC-12 series 2-post lifts
